creator: sbz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Roland,

Works like a charm.

% cd /usr/ports/devel/pep8
% sudo env DEVELOPER=yes PYTHON_VERSION=python2.7 make package
% sudo env DEVELOPER=yes PYTHON_VERSION=python3.5 make package
% ls *.txz
py27-pep8-1.7.0_1.txz   py35-pep8-1.7.0_1.txz

Committed into r416911. Thank you!
